entries.title: RESOLUTION ADOPTING AND APPROVING THE INTERNAL RULES OF PROCEDURES OF THE 18TH SANGGUNIANG PANLUNGSOD OF ILIGAN CITY FOR THE TERM BEGINNING JULY 1, 2022 TO JUNE 30, 2025, SUBJECT TO THE AMENDMENTS TO BE INTRODUCED WITHIN NINETY (90) DAYS
entries.summary: Sets the internal rules the City Council follows to conduct its own sessions for the 2022-2025 term.

entries.title: RESOLUTION AUTHORIZING CITY MAYOR FREDERICK W. SIAO, TO WITHDRAW FROM THE FIDELITY BOND PREMIUM WITH ACCOUNT CODE 5-02-16-020, TO PAY FOR THE BOND OF CITY VICE MAYOR MARIANITO D. ALEMANIA, SUBJECT TO THE EXISTING, LAWS, RULES AND REGULATIONS
entries.summary: Authorizes the Mayor to use fidelity bond funds to cover the Vice Mayor's own bonding requirement.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING CITY MAYOR FREDERICK W. SIAO, TO ENTER INTO A MEMORANDUM OF AGREEMENT (MOA) WITH THE ILIGAN CITY POLICE, THE ASSOCIATION OF BARANGAY CAPTAINS AND THE NATIONAL POLICE COMMISSION – REGIONAL OFFICE X FOR THE ADOPTION AND IMPLEMENTATION OF COMMUNITY AND SERVICE-ORIENTED POLICING SYSTEM (CSOP) AND OTHER RELATED PROGRAMS, PROJECTS AND SERVICES IN ILIGAN CITY
entries.summary: Authorizes a city-wide community policing partnership between the Mayor's office, Iligan City Police, barangay captains, and NAPOLCOM.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING FOR THE TEMPORARY CLOSURE OF PORTION OF CABILI AVENUE FROM ROTUNDA TO THE INTERSECTION OF QUEZON AVENUE (ONE SIDE ADJACENT LUDO BUILDING) ON JULY 31, 2022 FROM 9:00 A.M. TO 10:00 P.M., FOR THE "ILIGAN/RAVE PARTY AUTO MOTO EXHIBIT" HOSTED BY LMNTRX EVENTS PRODUCTION
entries.summary: Temporarily closes a stretch of Cabili Avenue for a commercial auto show, with pandemic-era health protocols required of the organizer.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING FOR THE TEMPORARY CLOSURE OF PORTION OF CABILI AVENUE EXTENSION AT PUROK 6, BARANGAY SARAY, ILIGAN CITY FROM 10:00 A.M. OF AUGUST 17, 2022, UP TO 3:00 A.M. OF AUGUST 18, 2022, FOR THE FIESTA CELEBRATION OF PUROK 6, BARANGAY SARAY, IN HONOR SR. SAN ROQUE, THEIR PATRON SAINT
entries.summary: Temporarily closes a street in Barangay Saray for a neighborhood fiesta.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING FOR THE TEMPORARY CLOSURE OF PORTION OF MARIANO BADELLES STREET (FROM THE CORNER OF SAN MIGUEL STREET UP TO THE APPROACH OF TAMBACAN BRIDGE), BARANGAY POBLACION, ILIGAN CITY AND THE UNNAMED ROAD IN BETWEEN PUROKS 1 AND 2 OF TAMBACAN (APPROACHING TAMBACAN BRIDGE) FROM 7:00 O'CLOCK IN THE EVENING OF AUGUST 24, 2022 TO 8:00 O'CLOCK IN THE MORNING OF AUGUST 25, 2022, DUE TO THE DISMANTLING OF THE OLD DILAPIDATED PIPES AND INSTALLATION OF 450MM Ø (18INCH) SPIRAL WELDED STEEL PIPES BY THE ILIGAN CITY WATERWORKS SYSTEM (ICWS)
entries.summary: Authorizes an overnight closure near Tambacan Bridge so crews can replace old water pipes with the city's waterworks system.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE SUSPENDING THE IMPLEMENTATION OF AMUSEMENT TAX ON DIFFERENT ACTIVITIES AND EVENTS, AND PAYMENTS OF TARPAULINS, STREAMERS AND THE LIKE AS STIPULATED UNDER SECTION 11 OF CITY ORDINANCE NO. 05-4807, FOR THE DURATION OF THE 2022 DIYANDI FESTIVAL
entries.summary: Suspends amusement tax on stalls, concerts, and events for the duration of the 2022 Diyandi Festival.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING FOR THE TEMPORARY CLOSURE OF SOME STREETS ADJACENT THE ILIGAN CITY FREEDOM PARK (RIZAL PARK) NAMELY: PORTIONS OF DEL PILAR AND AGUINALDO STREETS FROM THEIR CORNERS AT MARIANO BADELLES SR., STREET TO BENITO LABAO STREET; MABINI STREET FROM ITS JUNCTION AT DEL PILAR STREET TO QUEZON AVENUE AND DEL PILAR STREET FROM ITS JUNCTION AT MARIANO BADELLES SR., STREET TO BENITO LABAO STREET, BARANGAY POBLACION, ILIGAN CITY, FROM 5:00 P.M.-12:00 MIDNIGHT, EVERY FRIDAY, SATURDAY AND SUNDAY, TO ACCOMMODATE THE VENDORS AND CUSTOMERS DUE TO THE RESUMPTION OF THE OPERATION OF THE "NIGHT MARKET"
entries.summary: Reopens the weekend street closures around Freedom Park needed to run the city's Night Market.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AMENDING SECTION 4 (B) OF CITY ORDINANCE NO. 16-6523, ENTITLED; "AN ORDINANCE PROHIBITING THE MANUFACTURE, SALE, DISTRIBUTION, POSSESSION OR USE OF FIRECRACKERS OR PYROTECHNIC DEVICES AND THE EXPLODING OF FIRECRACKERS OR OTHER SIMILAR EXPLOSIVES WITHIN THE TERRITORIAL JURISDICTION OF ILIGAN CITY" BY ALLOWING THE FIREWORKS SHOW AT THE ANAHAW AMPHITHEATER AT 3:00 P.M. FOR THE OPENING SALVO AND THE DIYANDI FIREWORKS SHOW AT THE ILIGAN ESPLANADE AT 6:30 P.M., ON SEPTEMBER 1, 2022, AND ALL OTHER SALVOS THAT REQUIRE FIREWORKS, IN CELEBRATION OF THE 2022 DIYANDI FESTIVAL, INCLUDING OTHER OFFICIALLY RECOGNIZED ACTIVITIES OF THE LGU-ILIGAN, SUBJECT TO NATIONAL LAWS, AND RECOGNIZED SAFETY RULES AND PRECAUTIONS
entries.summary: Amends the citywide firecracker ban to allow two official fireworks shows during the 2022 Diyandi Festival.

entries.title: AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING FOR THE TEMPORARY CLOSURE OF PORTION OF CERTAIN CITY STREETS AFFECTED BY THE ACTIVITIES OF THE 2022 DIYANDI FESTIVAL SA ILIGAN
entries.summary: Schedules a series of street closures in September and early October for different 2022 Diyandi Festival activities.
